Sullivan has the same first and last name as the incumbent senator. The decision comes after complaints from the incumbent and Republican Party groups and eligibility concerns. stories.title: Alaska House advances gas pipeline tax break to state Senate for further work
stories.titleZh: 阿拉斯加州众议院向州参议院提出天然气管道税收减免，以便进一步开展工作
stories.description: The Alaska House of Representatives has voted to advance a multibillion-dollar tax break for the proposed trans-Alaska natural gas pipeline project. The House’s 34-5 action sends the tax break to the state Senate, which is expected to take up the issue next week. Legislators are in a 30-day special session devoted to the issue, and […]

stories.title: New icebreakers are coming to Alaska. Cities need to prepare housing, ports and more.
stories.titleZh: 新的破冰船即将来到阿拉斯加。城市需要准备住房、港口等。
stories.description: The U.S. Coast Guard will base two new icebreakers in Kodiak and one in Seward, it announced Thursday. The first two ships are expected in Kodiak in 2028, and the third ship is expected in Seward in the early 2030s, said Sen. Dan Sullivan, R-Alaska. The new ships are part of an 11-ship medium icebreaker […]

stories.title: A voter guide to Alabama’s primary runoffs
stories.titleZh: 阿拉巴马州初选选民指南
stories.description: Voters across Alabama go to the polls Tuesday to select party nominees for the 2026 midterm elections in five statewide and six legislative primary runoff elections. Sample ballots for all 67 counties can be found on the Secretary of State’s website. Alabama has open primaries, so voters can ask for a Democratic or Republican ballot […]

stories.title: How do courts let cruel and unusual punishments persist? By ignoring the cruelty
stories.titleZh: 法院如何让残忍和不寻常的惩罚持续存在？通过忽视残忍

Smith convulsed and struggled for breath over the course of many minutes. Did this lead to any reflection about what happened in Holman prison? No. The Alabama attorney general […]

stories.title: Alabama Republican Party rules for Tommy Tuberville in residency challenge

Tommy Tuberville’s residency from his former primary opponent Ken McFeeters, keeping him the GOP gubernatorial nominee. Scott Stadthagen, chair of the Alabama Republican Party (ALGOP), announced the ruling of the the 21-member steering committee on Sunday afternoon. Stadthagen, a member of the committee, did […]

stories.title: Dozens object to rule requiring Arkansas libraries to restrict ‘sexually explicit’ materials

stories.title: Final Rules for Medicaid Work Requirements Are Out. Here’s What You Need To Know.

The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services released the rules on June 1. That deadline was set last year […]

stories.title: Hobbs signs $18.3B Arizona budget, calling Trump-conforming tax cuts a ‘historic’ win

stories.title: AZ Legislature ends 2026 session after late-night GOP push to send conservative agenda to voters

stories.title: After compromise dies, Arizona GOP rushes through ballot referral to block voucher reforms

stories.title: Newsom says he’s on Trump’s ‘hit list’ as Justice Department interviews governor’s friends

stories.title: California admits using high-risk AI — including systems it failed to report last year

stories.title: Fifty for 150: Pope John Paul II in 1993 at center of Colorado’s biggest gathering

stories.title: Melat Kiros rallies supporters at Colorado Capitol after venue changes and Hasan Piker absence
stories.titleZh: Melat Kiros在场地变更和Hasan Piker缺席后在科罗拉多州议会大厦召集支持者

Kiros, a 29-year-old lawyer and first-time candidate, is challenging Rep. Diana DeGette in the Democratic […]

stories.title: New Haven mother sues federal government over ICE detainment
stories.titleZh: 纽黑文母亲起诉联邦政府ICE拘留
stories.description: Nancy Martinez claims ICE agents handcuffed her and took her away without showing a warrant, leaving her children behind.

stories.title: Melanie Cradle nominated as first Black woman to CT Supreme Court
stories.titleZh: Melanie Cradle被提名为CT最高法院的第一位黑人女性
stories.description: Chief Judge Melanie L. Cradle of the Appellate Court would succeed Joan Alexander, who has submitted her resignation as an associate justice.

stories.title: Proposed R2 polytechnic at CCSU sparks debate over future of liberal arts education
stories.titleZh: CCSU拟议的R2理工学院引发了关于文科教育未来的辩论

stories.title: Dover residents talk homelessness, creating community at Spotlight Delaware event

stories.description: Nearly two dozen residents gathered in a Dover community center last Tuesday, dining on pasta and garlic knots while discussing what they felt were the city’s most pressing issues. stories.title: Delaware officials pick DSU dorms for new Kent County homeless shelter

stories.title: TikTok is not complying with social media law restricting minors, state says

stories.title: Kemp backs Burt Jones in race to be Georgia’s next governor

stories.title: How an Idaho state agency stores decades of old government records and artifacts

Red ink has bled through — a consequence of state archivists deciding to laminate the first few pages in the ‘70s. But even though the state’s foundational legal document is showing wear, it’s available for the public to see — like thousands of other […]

stories.description: What would you do if your rental costs doubled next month? In Idaho, some landlords and management companies impose steep month-to-month lease fees that can do just that. A month-to-month fee is an additional charge added to monthly rent in exchange for the flexibility of a short-term lease agreement. Often, these fees take effect once […]

stories.description: The measures would address delays at all stages of the state’s contracting process.

stories.title: Email from Bevin’s account accuses estranged son of trying to ‘shake parents down for money’

stories.description: An email Friday from former Kentucky Gov. Matt Bevin’s personal account to various media outlets, blasts lawyers for his estranged son, Jonah Bevin, for making “FALSE STATEMENTS” to the media and accuses Jonah of trying “TO SHAKE HIS PARENTS DOWN FOR MONEY.” The two-page email, mostly in capital letters, repeats attacks on Jefferson Family Court […]

stories.title: Why the way we understand the South matters, especially in criminal justice
stories.titleZh: 为什么我们理解南方的方式很重要，特别是在刑事司法方面
stories.description: As we reflect on 250 years of this unfinished great experiment, I think it is a profound error to frame the South merely, or principally, as the repository of America's greatest sins.

stories.title: Experts say time is the key element for Louisiana vanishing coast, culture

stories.description: Chris Harding, who Gov. Maura Healey tapped to lead the CCC in May, said during a meeting Thursday that his priorities for the role include engaging with staff and understanding their focuses as well as the agency's organizational challenges and opportunities.

stories.title: Raj Chetty’s prescription for reviving the American dream

stories.description: For generations, it was virtually guaranteed that American children would out-earn their parents. But as Raj Chetty explains in this special live episode of The Codcast, recorded at the recent WBUR Festival, that dream is fading. What factors are contributing to economic stagnation? How can we increase upward mobility? How do these trends vary across neighborhoods, race, gender, and immigration status?

stories.title: Raj Chetty’s prescription for reviving the American dream
stories.titleZh: Raj Chetty复兴美国梦的处方
stories.description: As the American dream has slipped out of reach for many, few have done more than Chetty to try to understand the fading of the American dream and what could be done to change that dispiriting trendline.

stories.title: DoHS to fund WV Family Support Centers this summer, but long-term funding uncertain under Morrisey
stories.titleZh: DoHS将于今年夏天为WV家庭支持中心提供资金，但Morrisey的长期资金不确定
stories.description: DAVIS, W.Va. — Federal funding for West Virginia’s Family Support Centers, which provide food and child abuse prevention services to children and families, will be available next month to keep the centers open this summer. However, it’s not clear if long-term funding will continue under Gov. Patrick Morrisey as he reviews the use of federal […]

stories.title: Schools, nonprofits try to keep WV kids fed this summer amid grocery price hikes, welfare changes
stories.titleZh: 今年夏天，在杂货价格上涨、福利变化的情况下，学校、非营利组织试图让西弗吉尼亚州的孩子们吃饱
stories.description: The West Virginia Department of Education is working with local partners this summer to provide statewide feeding sites for those 18 years old and younger, working to put together nutritious meals while navigating surging food costs.

stories.title: WV voters support keeping school vaccine mandates, poll finds
stories.titleZh: 民意调查发现，西弗吉尼亚州选民支持保留学校疫苗接种要求
stories.description: Most voters in West Virginia support keeping school vaccination requirements, according to a poll released last week. The poll found that 69% of the state’s electorate and 57% of the state’s likely Republican primary voters are opposed to eliminating school vaccine mandates. The poll was conducted in February 2026 by Virginia-based political polling agency Cygnal […]

stories.title: Local governments’ ability to collect property taxes in limbo due to uncertainty over 4% cap
stories.titleZh: 由于上限超过4%的不确定性，地方政府征收房产税的能力处于不确定状态
stories.description: “This is so unprecedented, we don't really have a blueprint,” one official told WyoFile. The post Local governments’ ability to collect property taxes in limbo due to uncertainty over 4% cap appeared first on WyoFile .

stories.title: Wyoming lawmakers mull electric generation tax to address average customers’ rising bills
stories.titleZh: 怀俄明州立法者考虑征收发电税，以解决普通客户不断上涨的账单
stories.description: Sen. Cale Case urged the Revenue Committee to tap into what could be a huge new source of revenue to benefit the entire state. The post Wyoming lawmakers mull electric generation tax to address average customers’ rising bills appeared first on WyoFile .

stories.title: Public lands travelogue 2026: Hidden gems
stories.titleZh: 公共土地游记2026 ：隐藏的瑰宝
stories.description: Public lands close to home offer the chance to build lasting memories, writes columnist Walt Gasson. The post Public lands travelogue 2026: Hidden gems appeared first on WyoFile .
